summary: Verified all requested features: Payroll page loads correctly, Salary Calculator shows 3-column layout, Quick Add Customer feature works in both Quotations and Sales Orders pages.
passed_tests: Payroll Page - loads correctly without errors
Payroll Page - shows employee list with salary details (Firdous Ahmad Bedar - ₹9,400)
Payroll Page - displays summary cards (Total Gross, Total Deductions, Total Net Payable)
Payroll Page - Month/Year filters work correctly
Payroll Page - 'Mark Paid' action button visible for processed payroll
Salary Calculator Page - 3-column layout displays correctly
Salary Calculator Page - Column 1 (Blue): Select Employee & Month with all inputs
Salary Calculator Page - Column 2 (Orange): Calculation Steps showing deductions
Salary Calculator Page - Column 3 (Green): Net Salary Calculation with prominent green box
Salary Calculator Page - Final salary displayed correctly (₹9,400)
Quotations Page - New Quotation form has '+' button (UserPlus icon) next to Customer dropdown
Quotations Page - Clicking '+' opens 'Add New Customer' modal
Quotations Page - Modal has Name*, Phone*, Email fields
Quotations Page - Adding customer shows success toast and creates customer (verified via backend logs)
Sales Orders Page - New Order form has '+' button (UserPlus icon) next to Customer dropdown
Sales Orders Page - Clicking '+' opens 'Add New Customer' modal
Sales Orders Page - Modal has Name*, Phone*, Email fields
Sales Orders Page - Adding customer shows success toast and creates customer (verified via backend logs)
critical_code_review_comments: PayrollPage.js: Well-structured with data-testid='payroll-page', proper loading state, and employee table
PayrollCalculatorPage.js: 3-column layout using lg:grid-cols-3, each column has distinct color theme (blue, orange, green)
QuotationsPage.js: Quick Add Customer button has data-testid='quick-add-customer-btn', modal properly implemented
SalesOrdersPage.js: Quick Add Customer button has data-testid='quick-add-customer-btn', modal properly implemented
Both Quick Add modals correctly update customers state and form after successful creation
seed_data_creation: Created test customers via Quick Add feature: 'Test Quick Customer' and 'Test Sales Customer'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Payroll page loads with employee list and salary details, 2) Salary Calculator has 3-column pamphlet layout, 3) Quick Add Customer feature added to Quotations and Sales Orders pages with UserPlus icon button next to Customer dropdown. The modal has Name*, Phone*, Email fields and successfully creates customers.
